scripts.invoke:local: yarn build && sam local invoke GetArticle -e ./mocks/event.json
scripts.invoke:local:authorizer: yarn build && sam local invoke AuthorizerFunction -e ./mocks/authorizerEvent.json --env-vars ./mocks/env.json
scripts.generate:mock: sam local generate-event apigateway aws-proxy --method GET --path /get-article > ./mocks/event.json
